description: Zotero reference manager CLI — every library feature in the terminal, plus offline search, annotation export, and library analytics

tools.name: collections_create
tools.description: Create one or more collections. Required: name. Optional: parentCollection. (requires API key)

tools.name: collections_delete
tools.description: Delete a collection (does not delete items). Required: collectionKey. Destructive. (requires API key)

tools.name: collections_get
tools.description: Get a specific collection. Required: collectionKey. Returns the Collection.

tools.name: collections_items
tools.description: List all items in a collection. Required: collectionKey. Optional: limit, start, format. Returns array of Item.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return

tools.name: collections_list
tools.description: List all collections. Optional: limit, start. Returns array of Collection.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of collections to return

tools.name: collections_subcollections
tools.description: List subcollections of a collection. Required: collectionKey. Returns array of Collection.

tools.name: collections_tags
tools.description: List tags used within a collection. Required: collectionKey. Returns array of Tag.

tools.name: collections_top
tools.description: List only top-level collections (no parents). Optional: limit. Returns array of Collection.

tools.name: collections_update
tools.description: Update a collection. Required: collectionKey. Optional: name, parentCollection. (requires API key)

params.name: parentCollection
params.description: New parent collection key (false for top-level)

tools.name: items_children
tools.description: Get child items (attachments and notes) for an item. Required: itemKey. Optional: itemType. Returns array of Item.

tools.name: items_create
tools.description: Create one or more items. Optional: items. (requires API key)

params.name: items
params.description: Array of item objects to create (use item-types and item-type-fields for schema)

tools.name: items_delete
tools.description: Delete an item (moves to trash). Required: itemKey. Destructive. (requires API key)

tools.name: items_get
tools.description: Get a single item by key. Required: itemKey. Optional: format. Returns the Item.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format (json, bib, bibtex, csljson, ris, etc.)

tools.name: items_list
tools.description: List all items in the library. Optional: limit, start, sort (plus 6 more). Returns array of Item.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return (max 100)

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort field (dateAdded, dateModified, title, creator, type, date, publisher, publicationTitle, journalAbbreviation, language, accessDate, libraryCatalog, callNumber, rights, addedBy)

params.name: itemType
params.description: Filter by item type (journalArticle, book, bookSection, conferencePaper, etc.)

params.name: query
params.description: Quick search across title, creator, and year

params.name: since
params.description: Return only items modified after this library version number

params.name: format
params.description: Response format (json, atom, bib, bibtex, bookmarks, coins, csljson, mods, refer, rdf_bibliontology, rdf_dc, rdf_zotero, ris, tei, wikipedia)

tools.name: items_tags
tools.description: Get tags for a specific item. Required: itemKey. Returns array of Tag.

tools.name: items_top
tools.description: List top-level items only (excludes attachments and notes). Optional: limit, start, sort (plus 3 more). Returns array of Item.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return

tools.name: items_trash
tools.description: List items in the trash. Optional: limit. Returns array of Item.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return

tools.name: items_update
tools.description: Update a specific item. Required: itemKey. Optional: title, abstractNote, tags (plus 2 more). Partial update. (requires API key)

params.name: tags
params.description: Tags to apply (array of {tag: string} objects)

params.name: collections
params.description: Collection keys to assign this item to

params.name: extra
params.description: Extra notes field (also stores Better BibTeX citation key)

tools.name: schema_creator-fields
tools.description: List all creator fields (firstName, lastName, name). Returns array of CreatorField.

tools.name: schema_item-fields
tools.description: List all available item fields. Returns array of ItemField.

tools.name: schema_item-type-creator-types
tools.description: List valid creator types for an item type. Required: itemType. Returns array of CreatorType.

tools.name: schema_item-type-fields
tools.description: List valid fields for a specific item type. Required: itemType. Returns array of ItemField.

tools.name: schema_item-types
tools.description: List all available Zotero item types. Returns array of ItemType.

tools.name: schema_new-item-template
tools.description: Get a blank template for creating a new item of a given type. Required: itemType. Returns the Item.

params.name: itemType
params.description: Item type to get template for (e.g. journalArticle)

tools.name: searches_get
tools.description: Get a specific saved search. Required: searchKey. Returns the Search.

tools.name: searches_list
tools.description: List all saved searches. Optional: limit. Returns array of Search.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of searches to return

tools.name: tags_get
tools.description: Get a specific tag by name. Required: tagName. Returns array of Tag.

tools.name: tags_list
tools.description: List all tags in the library. Optional: limit, start, query. Returns array of Tag.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of tags to return
